title: order by over table from another function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'A', 10.50), (2, 'B', NULL), (3, 'C', 20.00);
CREATE TABLE t2 (fieldID INTEGER, description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'No Description');
SELECT t1.name, t1.value FROM t1 ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2) DESC;
key_bug_features: order by over table from another function
